nav.cta: Work with us
hero.subtitle: Three developers, one unified team: backend architecture, QA precision, and frontend craftsmanship. Python · Node · React · API testing · automation.
hero.cta2: View our work
about.title: Three backgrounds, one engineering mindset.
about.desc: We’re a compact, high‑performance trio from Colégio Árvore da Felicidade’s technical program. Together we combine backend reliability (Python/Django, Node.js), frontend finesse (React, Next, TypeScript), and a rigorous QA approach — creating products that are stable, fast, and user‑focused.
about.quote: “We don’t just write code — we validate, automate, and craft. Our edge: QA thinking baked into development, and frontend that respects the user.”
tech.subtitle: Technologies
tech.title: Full‑stack coverage, precision tooling.
services.subtitle: What we offer
services.title: End‑to‑end development & quality assurance.
serv.dev.title: Software Development
serv.dev.desc: Full‑stack apps with React, Next, Django or Node. Clean architecture, from idea to deployment.
serv.auto.title: Process Automation
serv.auto.desc: Background tasks, data pipelines, and workflow automation with Python & Celery.
serv.qa.title: QA & Test Strategy
serv.qa.desc: API testing, smoke tests, test case reviews. Built‑in quality, not an afterthought.
serv.data.title: Data & Integration
serv.data.desc: RESTful APIs, third‑party integrations, database design. Systems that talk to each other.
proj.subtitle: Selected work
proj.title: Where impact meets code.
proj1.title: Automated exam correction (American format) + AI
proj1.desc: Full‑stack system with React/TypeScript frontend, Python/Django+DRF backend, Celery for background correction, and integrated AI. Omar led backend architecture; João built the interface & real‑time stats; Patrício performed API validation and smoke tests.
proj2.title: Kandala · Beauty Salon Landing Page
proj2.desc: A modern and elegant landing page designed for a beauty salon to showcase their premium services and enhance digital presence. Designed with Figma and developed to be fully responsive focusing on a high-converting user experience.
proj3.title: Internal Voting System
proj3.desc: A secure internal web application developed for Colégio Árvore da Felicidade activities. It features real-time voting, live ranking boards, score tracking, and a comprehensive management dashboard for administrators.
proj4.title: zakki · AI Assistant
proj4.desc: A highly capable AI assistant powered by OpenAI and Gemini, designed for precise, context-aware, and structured interactions.
team.subtitle: The trio
team.title: Specialists united by craft.
team.pat.desc: Focus on API validation, functional testing, and Python backend. Brings analytical rigor and test‑first mindset.
team.omar.desc: Architects scalable APIs (Flask, Django, Express). Leads backend teams and integrates AI‑driven features.
team.joao.desc: Crafts responsive UIs with React, Next, TypeScript. Design system advocate and Figma prototyper.
